stemHtml: Select the correct statement with regard to short term stress and chronic stress:

options.a: A person who is frequently exposed to acute stressors will, in the long run, reach an excessive level of stress and develop psychosomatic disorders.
options.b: Work stress tends to be cumulative; however, domestic stress cannot add to the stress level experienced while flying.
options.c: Chronic stress can result from aviation-related issues, but can also be a consequence of problems at home.
options.d: Acute stressors can only lead to distress when a person has a high level of chronic stress.
